title: Japanese-Style Grilled Tofu with Miso Sauce
description: Grilled tofu served with a side of savory miso sauce, inspired by Japanese flavors.
instructions: Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and season with salt.
Grill the tofu for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Meanwhile, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, rice vinegar, ginger, and brown sugar in a small bowl.
Bring the miso sauce to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat, whisking constantly.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
To serve, place the grilled tofu on a plate and spoon the miso sauce over the top.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
